description_text: Detail Specification: -Type: Car Rear Lip & Body Side Skirts -Color: Glossy Black -Side Skirt Length: 27cm -Material: Polyurethane (ABS) -Position: Rear Lip Or Side Skirt Extension -Fitment Type: Direct Replacement Feature: -Universal modified rear lip and side skirt for car sedan. -brand new direct replacement as shown in the picture -Comes with 2PC Rear lip wrap angle splitters -Please measure your Rear lip wrap angle and make sure these splitters will fit -Custom fit most vehicles, product may require drilling holes and apply bolts to attach to your bumper -Use double side adhesive tape or drill holes and bolt on to your bumper (bolts are included) -Give your car a more aggressive racing look -New and nice qulity, durable to use. -Easy installation and easy to use. -A Perfect Aftermarket Replacement. Package: Pair Car Bumper Spoiler Rear Lip 1bag Bolts Reviews Shipping Policy Payment Mathord Returns Policy About Feedback Please check the item location of the listing and comfirm where the package will be sent from! 1.Item location:Guangzhou,China Item will be shipped out receipt of your payment. We ship the item through CHINA Air mail. Please make sure your address in eBay is correct. If you want to change the address, please give us ebay message right away you make the payment. Combing shipment is not allowed. If you wants to combine all the items together, you should still pay for all of the shipping, insurance and handing fees. Considering the cost of business and easy shipping, usually the item is packed in retail packaging. Normally, the item will arrive in 15-20 days. But sometimes it takes a little bit longer, goes to 20-30 days or more 2.Item location:California, United States Item will be shipped out within 24 hours upon receipt of your payment. Orders from the USA will all be shipped out via Carrier UPS OR USPS.Usually it takes up 3~8 business days for delivery. Delivery time (including weekend): 5.21%(1~2days)----65.68%(3~5D)----22.19%(6~8D)----2.47%(9~10D)----1.26%(above 10D) When you find track information is abnormal or not get goods in 10 days, please feel free to email contact us first for troubleshooting,Don't open dispute case immediately Please. Please make sure your address in eBay is correct.If you want to change the address, please give us ebay message right away you make the payment
